name: Chenko

base_stats.notable: Epic heroes have lower Expedition scaling (140.11%) than Gen 1 Legendaries (200.16%).

conquest.name: Burst Fire
conquest.description: Unleashes a rapid barrage, dealing damage to enemies in front every 0.5 seconds for 2 seconds.

conquest.name: Defense Upgrade
conquest.description: Chenko upgrades her armor, increasing her Defense.

conquest.name: Weapon Upgrade
conquest.description: Chenko's upgraded weapon boosts her Attack.

expedition.name: Stand of Arms
expedition.description: Chenko implements advanced weaponry for our soldiers, increasing the total Squads' Lethality.

expedition.name: Shield Wall
expedition.description: Enhances troop armor with a keen engineering eye, reducing damage taken for all troops.

skills.epic_note: Epic heroes do not have Exclusive Gear slots. Confirmed architectural pattern across all Gen 1 Epics researched.

exclusive_gear_note: Epic heroes do not have exclusive gear.

order: Max Stand of Arms FIRST (Expedition) — the sole defining skill

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at epic tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

named_pairs.vs_same: 12.5% better than 4× Chenko pure same-hero stacking

lineup_inferences.note: Chenko for rally joining — the best F2P rally joiner.
Chenko + Amane + Yeonwoo form the S-tier joiner trio for bear hunt.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Chenko's Stand of Arms squad Lethality buff stacks with any rally composition. Her status as 'best F2P rally joiner' makes her a universal pick for free players from Gen 1 through late game.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.shard_cost_to_star_up: Epic heroes have lower shard requirements than Legendaries — heroes.js notes Epics are 'good for early investment' due to lower costs.
f2p_investment.reasoning: 4 F2P access methods confirmed. Epic shard requirements are significantly lower than Legendary. Essential F2P pick according to heroes.js ('considered the best rally joiner skill for F2P players').

rally.reasoning: Not a rally lead — Epic heroes don't have the firepower for lead slots.

bear_hunt.reasoning: Essential bear hunt joiner — the best F2P rally joiner skill in the game per heroes.js.

joiner.reasoning: S-tier joiner via Stand of Arms squad Lethality buff.

lore_background.title: The Blunderbuss Inventor
lore_background.backstory: Chenko is an inventor who wields a blunderbuss she calls a 'lightning stick.' She creates weapons and armor upgrades for the army, but her early career was defined by a struggle for funding — she couldn't find backers who believed in her inventions. When a Rebel attack hit the city, the chaos gave her the breakthrough demonstration opportunity she needed. Her designs proved themselves in the battle, and she earned her place in the arsenal by saving the people who almost refused to fund her.

deep_analysis: Chenko is the best F2P rally joiner in Kingshot — a Gen 1 Epic Cavalry hero whose Stand of Arms Expedition skill provides up to +25% squad Lethality, making her a universal plug-in for any rally composition regardless of the lead hero. Her full kit is built around self-improvement and squad support. Conquest tree: Burst Fire deals rapid damage (Attack × 75% per half-second for 2 seconds), Defense Upgrade boosts her own Defense by up to 70%, and Weapon Upgrade boosts her own Attack by up to 24%. Expedition tree: Stand of Arms buffs squad Lethality by up to 25%, and Shield Wall reduces all troops' damage taken by up to 20%. As an Epic hero, she has no Exclusive Gear slot — the architectural confirmation that only Legendary heroes get exclusive gear. Her Expedition scaling (140.11%) is notably lower than Gen 1 Legendaries (200.16%), reflecting her Epic tier. Tier: S Bear Hunt, S Joiner, — Rally and Garrison. F2P-accessible through 4 methods: Path of Growth, Watchtower Intel, Hero Recruitment, and Epic General Hero Shard. heroes.js notes that her Stand of Arms 'rally value' is considered the best F2P rally joiner skill in the game. Her lore is charming: an inventor who wields a blunderbuss she calls her 'lightning stick,' who struggled to find funding for her weapon designs until a Rebel attack gave her the demonstration opportunity to prove them in real combat.
unverified_fields: skills.conquest.Shield Wall — actually in Expedition section per source structure? Needs verification, but positioned as squad-wide so more likely Expedition
Category split between Conquest (self-buffs) and Expedition (squad buffs) is my interpretation — kingshotwiki had flat skill list

handbook_meta.description: Chenko proves that rarity doesn't determine meta viability. Despite being an Epic hero with only two skills and no widget access, she remains the premier offensive joiner from Generation 1 through Generation 5 and beyond due to her +25% Lethality and effect_op 101 code.
